formulas.formula: Production and delivery + Depreciation depletion and amortization = Total cost of sales
formulas.operation: Production and delivery + Depreciation, depletion and amortization

formulas.formula: Total cost of sales + Selling general and administrative expenses + Exploration and research expenses + Environmental obligations and shutdown costs = Total costs and expenses
formulas.operation: Total cost of sales + Selling, general and administrative expenses + Exploration and research expenses + Environmental obligations and shutdown costs

formulas.formula: Revenues - Total costs and expenses = Operating income
Operating income + Interest expense net + Other income net = Income before income taxes and equity in affiliated companies net earnings
components: Income before income taxes and equity in affiliated companies net earnings
formulas.operation: Operating income + Interest expense, net + Other income, net
formulas.result_label: Income before income taxes and equity in affiliated companies net earnings

formulas.formula: Income before income taxes - Provision for income taxes + Equity in affiliated companies net earnings = Net income
components: Income before income taxes and equity in affiliated companies net earnings
Equity in affiliated companies net earnings
formulas.operation: Income before income taxes and equity in affiliated companies net earnings - Provision for income taxes + Equity in affiliated companies net earnings

formulas.formula: Net income - Net income attributable to noncontrolling interests = Net income attributable to common stockholders
components: Net income attributable to noncontrolling interests
Net income attributable to common stockholders
formulas.operation: Net income - Net income attributable to noncontrolling interests
formulas.result_label: Net income attributable to common stockholders

formulas.formula: Net income + Depreciation depletion and amortization + Stock-based compensation + Net charges for environmental and asset retirement obligations + Payments for environmental and asset retirement obligations + Net charges for defined pension and postretirement plans + Pension plan contributions + Deferred income taxes + Change in deferred profit + Charges for social investment programs + Payments for social investment programs + Other net + Accounts receivable + Inventories + Other current assets + Accounts payable and accrued liabilities + Accrued income taxes = Net cash provided by operating activities

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: Total consolidated capital expenditures of 1254 appears in the segment reporting table as a total; the cash flow statement presents capital expenditures broken out by segment rather than as a single line

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches cash on BS (current period - total including restricted)
cross_statement_checks.note: CF ending cash of 6340 equals BS cash (5208) + restricted current (1034) + restricted noncurrent (98) = 6340 per Note 6 reconciliation table

cross_statement_checks.check: Beginning cash on CF matches cash on BS (prior period - total including restricted)
cross_statement_checks.note: CF beginning cash of 6063 equals BS December 31 2023 cash (4758) + restricted current (1208) + restricted noncurrent (97) = 6063 per Note 6 reconciliation table

cross_statement_checks.check: Retained earnings change on BS matches net income minus dividends and other charges to retained earnings
cross_statement_checks.note: Retained earnings changed from -2059 to -1586 (improvement of 473). Net income attributable to common stockholders was 473. Total dividends charged to retained earnings per equity statement = 217 (common) + 173 (NCI share) = 390 (us-gaap:DividendsCommonStockCash = 390). However the equity statement shows retained earnings changed by exactly 473 from net income and -217 from dividends in the parent company column. Starting RE: -2059 + 473 net income - 217 dividends (per parent column in equity stmt) = -1803 which does not equal -1586. Reviewing equity statement more carefully: APIC decreased from 24637 to 24488 (-149) due to SBC activity. Common stock held in treasury increased from 5773 to 5817 (+44). Total stockholders equity changed from 16693 to 16973 (+280). The equity statement shows RE line in parent column changed from -2059 by +473 net income and -217 dividends in APIC column. The actual RE change per XBRL: -2059 to -1586 = +473 exactly equals net income attributable to common stockholders with no direct dividend charge to accumulated deficit - dividends are charged through APIC/Capital in excess of par value column per the equity statement

operating_leases.current_location: Operating lease liabilities are not separately disclosed on the face of the balance sheet or in notes with specific XBRL tags in this filing. The company uses the combined 'Accounts payable and accrued liabilities' line for current liabilities and 'Other liabilities' for noncurrent. No specific OperatingLeaseLiability XBRL facts were found in the undimensioned facts provided. Operating lease amounts may be embedded within these combined line items but specific values cannot be confirmed from available data.

accounts_payable.combined_with: Accrued liabilities - the balance sheet line is labeled Accounts payable and accrued liabilities and uses concept us-gaap:AccountsPayableAndAccruedLiabilitiesCurrent

components.description: Current portion of long-term debt per balance sheet

interest_expense.source: Note 5 discloses consolidated interest costs before capitalization of 175 million. Capitalized interest was 86 million. Net interest expense on income statement is 89 million (175 - 86 = 89). The XBRL concept InterestIncomeExpenseNet = -89 confirms the net expense. Gross interest income not separately disclosed.

flags: Effective rate of 31% includes a net benefit of 182 million related to closure of PT-FI 2021 corporate income tax audit; underlying rate excluding this benefit would be higher
US jurisdiction expected to generate net losses in 2024 with 0% effective rate applied to US portion

inventory.note: Total inventory = Product (2356 current) + Materials and supplies (2202) + Current mill and leach stockpiles (1419) + Long-term mill and leach stockpiles (1313) = 7290. Product consists of raw materials 413 + WIP 252 + finished goods 1691 = 2356

formula_checks.formula: Production and delivery + Depreciation depletion and amortization = Total cost of sales
Total cost of sales + Selling general and administrative expenses + Exploration and research expenses + Environmental obligations and shutdown costs = Total costs and expenses
Revenues - Total costs and expenses = Operating income
Operating income + Interest expense net + Other income net = Income before income taxes and equity in affiliated companies net earnings
Income before income taxes - Provision for income taxes + Equity in affiliated companies net earnings = Net income
Net income - Net income attributable to noncontrolling interests = Net income attributable to common stockholders

Cash and cash equivalents + Restricted cash and cash equivalents + Trade accounts receivable + Income and other tax receivables + Product + Materials and supplies net + Mill and leach stockpiles + Other current assets = Total current assets
Total current assets + Property plant equipment and mine development costs net + Long-term mill and leach stockpiles + Other assets = Total assets

Accounts payable and accrued liabilities + Accrued income taxes + Current portion of debt + Current portion of environmental and asset retirement obligations + Dividends payable = Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities + Long-term debt less current portion + Environmental and asset retirement obligations less current portion + Deferred income taxes + Other liabilities = Total liabilities
Common stock + Capital in excess of par value + Accumulated deficit + Accumulated other comprehensive loss - Common stock held in treasury = Total stockholders equity
Total stockholders equity + Noncontrolling interests = Total equity
Total liabilities + Total equity = Total liabilities and equity

Net income + Depreciation depletion and amortization + Stock-based compensation + Net charges for environmental and asset retirement obligations + Payments for environmental and asset retirement obligations + Net charges for defined pension and postretirement plans + Pension plan contributions + Deferred income taxes + Change in deferred profit + Charges for social investment programs + Payments for social investment programs + Other net + Accounts receivable + Inventories + Other current assets + Accounts payable and accrued liabilities + Accrued income taxes = Net cash provided by operating activities

Capital expenditures North America + Capital expenditures South America + Capital expenditures Indonesia mining + Capital expenditures Indonesia smelter + Capital expenditures Molybdenum + Capital expenditures Other + Loans to PT Smelting + Proceeds from sales of assets = Net cash used in investing activities

Proceeds from debt + Repayments of debt + Cash dividends Common stock + Cash dividends Noncontrolling interests + Contributions from noncontrolling interests + Proceeds from exercised stock options + Payments for withholding = Net cash used in financing activities
Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities = Net increase decrease in cash
Cash at beginning of year + Net increase decrease in cash = Cash at end of period
